generated_exposure.exposure_text: I get why people worry about alliance commitments, but let's be real - our partners aren't pulling their weight. Remember when France pulled out of NATO's command structure? We can't keep carrying the burden alone. The 2024 defense review showed that only 3 allies meet the 2% spending target. We need to make sure our commitments are fair and sustainable. #NationalSecurity #AllianceFairness
